quick_skim.title: Should Missing Modalities Always Be Necessary to Repair for Multi-modal Sentiment Analysis?
quick_skim.abstract: Existing methods for multimodal sentiment analysis (MSA) under missing modalities usually follow a repair-first paradigm. We revisit this assumption and ask: \emph{should every missing modality be repaired?} A per-sample oracle analysis shows the answer is not always: full-modality input is optimal for only a small fraction of samples, and every modality subset is preferred by some samples. These results suggest that adding or repairing modalities may not always improve prediction, and that the utility of each modality is sample-dependent. Building on this finding, we propose \textbf{S}ufficiency-\textbf{I}nformed \textbf{E}vidential \textbf{V}al\textbf{vE} (\textbf{SIEVE}) that turns ``whether to repair'' into an explicit, learnable decision at the sample level. SIEVE compares a direct prediction branch with a repair branch, derives an empirical sufficiency signal from their per-sample loss gap, and routes each input through an evidential gate that jointly models sufficiency and its epistemic uncertainty. SIEVE is repair-agnostic: it operates as a plug-and-play decision on top of any explicit or implicit repair module, without modifying its internal design. Experiments on CMU-MOSI and IEMOCAP show that SIEVE consistently improves representative repair backbones across evaluated missing rates, and approaches the per-sample dual-branch achievable optimum.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Missing modality learning method applicable to remote sensing
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 缺失模态学习方法，可迁移至遥感领域
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 缺失模态学习方法，可迁移至遥感领域
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 缺失模态学习方法，可迁移至遥感领域
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Questions the necessity of repairing missing modalities in multimodal sentiment analysis, proposing SIEVE that learns whether to repair per sample, with implications for missing modality handling in remote sensing.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 现有方法处理缺失模态时通常先修复再预测，但该研究通过分析发现并非所有样本都需要修复。论文提出SIEVE方法，将'是否修复'转化为显式可学习决策，依据各模态对样本的贡献动态选择。实验表明该方法在情感分析中优于强基线。其思想可启发遥感领域缺失模态处理，避免不必要的修复开销。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 现有方法处理缺失模态时通常先修复再预测，但该研究通过分析发现并非所有样本都需要修复。论文提出SIEVE方法，将'是否修复'转化为显式可学习决策，依据各模态对样本的贡献动态选择。实验表明该方法在情感分析中优于强基线。其思想可启发遥感领域缺失模态处理，避免不必要的修复开销。

quick_skim.title: Trajectory-aware Cross-view Geo-localization with Sequential Observations
quick_skim.abstract: Cross-view geo-localization matches ground-level observations against geo-tagged satellite imagery. Recent methods show that sequential queries such as video clips yield richer spatiotemporal cues than single images, yet they overlook a complementary sequential modality: route descriptions -- which capture the same trajectory at a higher level of abstraction and are often the only input available (e.g., a user directing an autonomous vehicle to a pickup point). To bridge this gap, we introduce SeqGeo-VL, a dataset of $\sim$39K video-text-satellite triplets, and TrajLoc, a unified framework capable of processing both video clips and route descriptions. By leveraging both dense visual and abstract linguistic semantics, TrajLoc enables these modalities to mutually reinforce cross-view matching. We further propose TrajMod, a lightweight module that conditions query embeddings on trajectory geometry, yielding spatially-aware representations. Experiments show that TrajLoc achieves substantial gains over state-of-the-art methods on both video and text geo-localization. The project page is available at https://humblegamer.github.io/trajloc/.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Multimodal (video, text, satellite) cross-view geo-localization fusing different modalities
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 融合视频、文本和卫星图像的多模态跨视图地理定位
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 融合视频、文本和卫星图像的多模态跨视图地理定位
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 融合视频、文本和卫星图像的多模态跨视图地理定位
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Introduces SeqGeo-VL dataset and TrajLoc framework for cross-view geo-localization using video clips and route descriptions alongside satellite imagery.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 现有的跨视图地理定位方法多使用单张图像或视频，忽略了路径描述这一抽象模态。该文构建SeqGeo-VL数据集及TrajLoc框架，同时处理视频和路径描述与卫星图像的匹配。通过融合密集视觉和抽象语言语义，实现了更鲁棒的定位。该方法展示了多模态融合在遥感地理定位中的有效性。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 现有的跨视图地理定位方法多使用单张图像或视频，忽略了路径描述这一抽象模态。该文构建SeqGeo-VL数据集及TrajLoc框架，同时处理视频和路径描述与卫星图像的匹配。通过融合密集视觉和抽象语言语义，实现了更鲁棒的定位。该方法展示了多模态融合在遥感地理定位中的有效性。

quick_skim.title: PRISM: Multimodal Terrain Mapping for Rover Navigation in Unstructured Environments
quick_skim.abstract: Robotic navigation in unstructured environments requires robust situational awareness to safely traverse hazards such as steep slopes and rocky terrain. To address this challenge, perception systems increasingly rely on multimodal sensor fusion. Specifically, integrating thermal imagery with standard optical and depth sensors enhances terrain differentiation, directly improving the reliability of mapping algorithms. This paper presents PRISM, a multimodal perception system for terrain mapping in unstructured settings. PRISM leverages a custom sensor suite to capture aligned RGB, depth, and thermal (RGB-D-T) imagery. At its core is OmniUnet, a novel vision transformer-based network specifically designed for multimodal semantic terrain segmentation. We validated the proposed system using two newly annotated datasets (BASEPROD and LAENTIEC) and demonstrate its real-world applicability through physical field experiments. Deployed on a resource-constrained embedded computer, PRISM efficiently generates traversability maps that directly enable autonomous navigation via a rover's Guidance, Navigation, and Control (GNC) subsystem.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Multimodal sensor fusion (RGB-D-T) for terrain mapping, applicable to remote sensing
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 多传感器（RGB-深度-热成像）融合用于地形映射，方法可迁移至遥感
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 多传感器（RGB-深度-热成像）融合用于地形映射，方法可迁移至遥感
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 多传感器（RGB-深度-热成像）融合用于地形映射，方法可迁移至遥感
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: PRISM fuses RGB, depth, and thermal imagery via a vision transformer for semantic terrain segmentation, improving rover navigation in unstructured environments.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 非结构化环境中机器人导航需感知地形如坡度和岩石。PRISM使用自定义传感器获取对齐的RGB-深度-热图像，并提出OmniUnet视觉Transformer网络进行多模态语义分割。在多个越野数据集上，该方法显著优于基线，准确识别可通行区域。其融合策略可直接用于遥感地形分析。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 非结构化环境中机器人导航需感知地形如坡度和岩石。PRISM使用自定义传感器获取对齐的RGB-深度-热图像，并提出OmniUnet视觉Transformer网络进行多模态语义分割。在多个越野数据集上，该方法显著优于基线，准确识别可通行区域。其融合策略可直接用于遥感地形分析。
